checks.name: Cloudflare Worker deployment
checks.evidence: npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml deployed retail-search version 61b9978e-788b-42f1-baa3-03c479a1c65c at https://retail-search.feroshjacob.workers.dev.

checks.name: public route organization
checks.evidence: Live checks confirmed / lists project phases, /phases/cranfield provides the Phase 1 overview, /phases/cranfield/search and /phases/cranfield/explain exclude evaluation-only text, /phases/cranfield/evaluation contains the evaluation examples, and /phase-1/search aliases correctly.

checks.name: planned phase route
checks.evidence: /phases/beir returned the Phase 2 - BEIR Transferability planned page.

checks.name: public API stability
checks.evidence: /api/search returned top result 652 for wing pressure distribution and top result 1201 for airfoil drag coefficient; /api/explain returned six retrievalFlow steps and top result 1201; /api/evaluation returned MAP 0.2402.

evidence_quality: Public verification covers the newly organized pages plus live OpenSearch-backed search, explain, and evaluation endpoints.
